_README: Verified equivalent mutants on Hard-Exclusion (read-only) targets. These survive mutation testing but cannot be killed (no input distinguishes mutant from original) and are NOT suppressed in source (read-only policy). Each must carry a concrete equivalence argument. ENFORCEMENT is via the per-target CI `break` threshold (set below 100 to absorb the immovable equivalent) — this file is an ADVISORY human-audit record + equivalence rationale, not auto-checked by CI. Line numbers drift when the source changes; re-verify on any edit to the listed file.

adaptive-goals.reason: `const goal = profile?.primaryGoal || "maintain"`. When the fallback fires, `goal` becomes "" (mutant) vs "maintain" (original). `goal` is consumed only by getGoalAdjustment (both "" and "maintain" hit the `return 0` fallthrough) and determineReason (both fail every `=== "lose_weight"|"gain_weight"` check -> "scheduled", whose explanation never references goal). It never enters the returned recommendation. No input distinguishes the two -> equivalent.
